ops.title: Clear local web caches after thin-content escalation ships
ops.description: The thin-content render-escalation change keeps `schemaVersion=1`, so web pages cached before the fix (thin JS app-shells) serve for up to 24h with `Thin=false` and no note. Per the approved plan, no self-heal logic — each machine clears its local web cache once after the release lands: `rm -rf ~/Library/Caches/cc-context/web` (macOS) plus `"$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/web"` for plugin installs.

ops.text: Local web cache directories (~/Library/Caches/cc-context/web and $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/web) removed on the dev machine after the escalation change is on main
A subsequent `ccx web outline` on a previously-cached JS-rendered page re-fetches (no stale thin snapshot served)
